wireless.radio2.type='morse'
wireless.radio2.channel='42'
wireless.radio2.s1g_chanbw='2'
wireless.radio0.type='mac80211'
wireless.radio3.type='mac80211'
wireless.radio3.path='platform/soc/fe300000.mmcnr/mmc_host/mmc1/mmc1:0001/mmc1:0001:1'
wireless.radio3.band='2g'
wireless.mesh0=wifi-iface
wireless.mesh0.device='radio2'
wireless.mesh0.ifname='wlan0'
wireless.mesh0.network='mesh'
wireless.mesh0.mode='mesh'
wireless.mesh0.mesh_id='test-mesh'
wireless.mesh0.encryption='sae'
wireless.mesh0.key='fixture-mesh-key'
network.bat0=interface
network.bat0.proto='batadv'
network.bat0.gw_mode='server'
network.mesh=interface
network.mesh.proto='batadv_hardif'
network.mesh.master='bat0'
network.ahwlan_dev=device
network.ahwlan_dev.name='br-ahwlan'
network.ahwlan_dev.type='bridge'
network.ahwlan_dev.ports='bat0'
network.ahwlan=interface
network.ahwlan.proto='static'
network.ahwlan.device='br-ahwlan'
network.ahwlan.ipaddr='10.41.1.1'
network.ahwlan.netmask='255.255.0.0'
network.wan=interface
network.wan.proto='dhcp'
network.wan.device='eth0'
mesh11sd.setup=mesh11sd
mesh11sd.setup.enabled='1'
mesh11sd.mesh_params=mesh11sd
mesh11sd.mesh_params.mesh_gate_announcements='1'
mesh11sd.mesh_params.priv_key_pwd='fixture-private-key'
dhcp.ahwlan=dhcp
dhcp.ahwlan.interface='ahwlan'
dhcp.ahwlan.start='351'
dhcp.ahwlan.limit='16'
dhcp.ahwlan.leasetime='12h'
firewall.mesh_zone=zone
firewall.mesh_zone.name='mesh'
firewall.mesh_zone.network='ahwlan'
firewall.mesh_wan_forwarding=forwarding
firewall.mesh_wan_forwarding.src='mesh'
firewall.mesh_wan_forwarding.dest='wan'
